data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Bounce handling and re-delivery', but the evidence does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for bounce handling and re-delivery, but there are no details or references to any implementation or testing of this feature. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of bounce handling and re-delivery functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract for bounce handling
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify bounce handling and re-delivery.
